supersedes: global affine v1 for a new fresh-system experiment; v1 results remain immutable

composition_transport.system_partition_rule: deterministic SHA256 radius removal while preserving every calibration element in the fit vocabulary

all_outcome_target_residual_state.base_prediction: composition-aware transported same-candidate source energy when certified; zero under rejection
all_outcome_target_residual_state.source_candidate_energy_role: current low-fidelity observable, not a deletable target-outcome subset

hard_gates.fresh_evaluation: no v1 evaluation exact system appears in v2 evaluation
hard_gates.cluster_certificate: clustered conformal radius must be finite and <= 0.15 eV/atom before evaluation
hard_gates.unsupported_chemistry: any unseen element must produce exact target-only fallback
hard_gates.null_replay: persistent sufficient state and same-order full-history replay must be identical every round
hard_gates.no_outcome_deletion: all revealed target outcomes update the sufficient statistics

pilot_go_rule.scope: fresh-system mechanism gate only, not paper-level superiority
requirements: unsupported-system proposed trajectory is exactly target-only
certified_all_outcome_state improves system-macro certified hull-decision cost and one-step regret over target-only and naive pooling
certified_all_outcome_state is non-inferior to composition_transport_only on hull-decision cost
the supported-system improvement spans at least two chemical-complexity strata
